mapper.sql: inventory_id, warehouse_code, inventory_status, source_type, quantity, unit, qa_status, prepare_quantity, modelno, inventory_property_id, price, in_time, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, supplierId, preReceiveDate, invoiceNo, associate_no, associate_no_item, associate_no_splitNo, sign_warehouse_code, delflag, greenCode, version, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, opt_status, opt_time, invoiceId, del_time, po_qty, pre_original_quantity, original_quantity, remark, associate_no_splitNo_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_move
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_move (inventory_id, warehouse_code, inventory_status, source_type, quantity, unit, qa_status, prepare_quantity, modelno, inventory_property_id, price, in_time, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, supplierId, preReceiveDate, invoiceNo, associate_no, associate_no_item, associate_no_splitNo, sign_warehouse_code, delflag, greenCode, version, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, opt_status, opt_time, invoiceId, del_time, po_qty, pre_original_quantity, original_quantity, remark, associate_no_splitNo_flag) values (#{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{inTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{optStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preOriginalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{originalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNoSplitnoFlag,jdbcType=BIT})

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_move
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_type = #{record.sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
unit = #{record.unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qa_status = #{record.qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepare_quantity = #{record.prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
in_time = #{record.inTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
preReceiveDate = #{record.prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no_item = #{record.associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
associate_no_splitNo = #{record.associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sign_warehouse_code = #{record.signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
greenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
opt_status = #{record.optStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
opt_time = #{record.optTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
del_time = #{record.delTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pre_original_quantity = #{record.preOriginalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
original_quantity = #{record.originalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no_splitNo_flag = #{record.associateNoSplitnoFlag,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.ops_inventory_move
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_status = #{inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_type = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
unit = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qa_status = #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepare_quantity = #{prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_property_id = #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
in_time = #{inTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
preReceiveDate = #{prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE},
invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no = #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no_item = #{associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
associate_no_splitNo = #{associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sign_warehouse_code = #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
greenCode = #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
opt_status = #{optStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
opt_time = #{optTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
del_time = #{delTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_qty = #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pre_original_quantity = #{preOriginalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
original_quantity = #{originalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no_splitNo_flag = #{associateNoSplitnoFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
where inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_move set warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_status = #{inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_type = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, unit = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qa_status = #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prepare_quantity = #{prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_property_id = #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, in_time = #{inTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preReceiveDate = #{prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE}, invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, associate_no = #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, associate_no_item = #{associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, associate_no_splitNo = #{associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sign_warehouse_code = #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, greenCode = #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, opt_status = #{optStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, opt_time = #{optTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, del_time = #{delTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, po_qty = #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pre_original_quantity = #{preOriginalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, original_quantity = #{originalQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, associate_no_splitNo_flag = #{associateNoSplitnoFlag,jdbcType=BIT} where inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
